description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features a prominent driveway leading to a detached garage, with a paved walkway flanked by several small trees. The main building has large, rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and a spacious backyard area with a swimming pool bordered by a wooden deck. The exterior is predominantly white with some gray and wooden accents, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The entryway is defined by a set of steps leading up to a simple, recessed front door. The overall layout is open and expansive, with clear separation between the main living area and the garage.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a backyard pool with a wooden deck. The exterior is white with gray and wood accents, and the entryway features steps and a recessed door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and several small trees lining the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the connection between the main house and garage, as well as the wooden deck and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, wooden deck, and the back facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the open backyard area with pool and deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed front door accessed by steps, minimalistic with no porch or columns, and a clean, modern appearance.
